name: Open Telemark and Feather Ending
preceding_figure_names: Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Feather Step, Hover Cross, Hover Feather, Natural Hover Telemark, Natural Telemark, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Top Spin
following_figure_names: Three Step, Change Of Direction, Basic Weave (1-4 Reverse Turn to end BDW, check, and Basic Weave), Reverse Turn (1-4 Reverse Turn to end BLOD near corner, check and Basic Weave turning 1/8, 1/8, 3/8; or 1/4, 1/8, 3/4; to end DW of new LOD), Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin (check back after step 6), Outside Swivel (check back after step 6), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot (at corner)
notes: When leading to PP ending, Man left his LF there (like in spiral turn), there is no brush, LF then steps out in step 3 to PP. It's different to do feather finish from PP. Lady really has to use this step 4 (S) and next step 5 (Q) to move a lot of space to keep up with Man.

steps.action: fwd, FDC, HT, start to turn L, Sway(S), CBM, rise e/o 1
to side and slightly fwd in PP, Pointing DW, Body Facing Wall, TH, body turns less, Sway(S), Up, lower e/o 3
fwd in PP and CBMP, Pointing DW, Body Facing Wall, HT
diag fwd preparing to step OP, Facing DW, T
comments: Upper body rotate slightly left, indicating Lady to close her head and do Feather Finish

steps.action: fwd in CBMP, OP, Facing DW, TH, Sway(R), Up, lower e/o 6
fwd, Facing DW, H, Sway(S), CBM
back, BDC, TH, start to turn L, Sway(S), CBM, rise slightly e/o 1, NFR
closes to RF (Heel Turn), LOD, HT, continue to rise on 2
comments: Do not turn the knees, keep knees flexed, keep action soft. Take stomach muscle back.

steps.action: diag fwd in PP, R side leading, Pointing to LOD, TH, slight body turn to L, Sway(S), Up, lower e/o 3
fwd and across in PP and CBMP, Pointing to LOD (Moving DW), HT, start to turn L, Sway(S), CBM, rise e/o 4
to side and slightly back, Backing Wall, TH
back, Backing DW, T, --, Sway(S), CBM, --
